untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detecting 'price gap lower' which cannot be expressed with available indicators. A gap would require comparing close[i-1] to open[i], but indexed array access is not permitted. Additionally, 'black candle' is a visual property not available in the indicator set (would need color classification). The pattern is context-dependent (reversal in bull, continuation in bear) which requires regime detection not fully expressible in the condition syntax.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using close < prev_close to detect downward movement and body property for black candle, but the explicit gap detection and regime-dependent logic cannot be properly encoded. Recommend: (1) Add gap_pct or gap_size indicator, (2) Add candle_color indicator, (3) Enhance condition syntax to support regime-conditional logic branches.
